metadata.description: Balanced AI code & writing review for Claude Code — a preserve-first review protocol plus a multi-model critic panel for a genuinely independent second opinion (local Ollama, subscription CLIs, or cloud, every paid call spend-gated).

plugins.name: spatiotemporal-critique
plugins.description: Balanced, intent-anchored review protocol that replaces the lone critic: preserves what works, steelmans choices, sizes to the task, and adds an independent external-model critic panel (different model families, capability-probed, spend-gated) for uncorrelated errors. Includes zero-config panel setup (--init) and a deterministic capability probe.
